series_metadata.series_description: Policy form and rate filings, including supporting documentation, final disposition, and related correspondence to/from admitted insurance companies authorized to sell life, health, or managed care insurance products. Authority: Includes (but not limited to) ORC sections 3902.01-3902.08, 1751.11-12, and 1751.31.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy until imaged, then destroy hard copy. Retain image 10 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain hard copy until imaged, then destroy hard copy. Retain image 10 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
